# Content Engine - Social Media Scripts for Traffic

## Generated by AI for Job Seekers

---

## 10 INSTAGRAM REEL SCRIPTS

### Reel 1: "Why Your Resume Gets Rejected"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"Your resume is getting rejected in 6 seconds. Here's why..."
[CONTENT - 3-20 sec]
- 95% of companies use ATS
- ATS scans for keywords
- Your resume might never reach human eyes
- I built a tool that fixes this automatically
[CTA]
"Link in bio to optimize your resume"
```

### Reel 2: "3 Words That Kill Your Resume"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"Delete these 3 words from your resume immediately..."
[CONTENT - 3-25 sec]
- "Responsible for" → Use "Led" or "Managed"
- "Helped with" → Use "Collaborated on"
- "Worked on" → Use "Delivered" or "Achieved"
- Before/After resume transformation
[CTA]
"Get your free resume review - link in bio"
```

### Reel 3: "I Made ₹50,000 in 30 Days With This Side Hustle"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"I made ₹50,000 in 30 days helping people get jobs..."
[CONTENT - 3-30 sec]
- Built an AI resume tool
- Solved a real problem
- No coding experience needed
- Started with just an idea
[CTA]
"I'll teach you how - follow for part 2"
```

### Reel 4: "Before/After Resume Transformation"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"Watch me transform a boring resume into an interview magnet..."
[CONTENT - 3-30 sec]
- Show original weak resume
- Highlight problems (vague bullets, no metrics)
- AI optimization process
- Show final result
[CTA]
"Get your resume transformed - link in bio"
```

### Reel 5: "Why Freshers Don't Get Interview Calls"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"Fresher? Here's why you're not getting interview calls..."
[CONTENT - 3-25 sec]
- No industry keywords
- Generic descriptions
- Missing quantifiable achievements
- How to fix it in minutes
[CTA]
"Free resume tip sheet - comment RESUME"
```

### Reel 6: "ATS System Exposed"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"I cracked how ATS systems work. Here's the secret..."
[CONTENT - 3-30 sec]
- ATS scans for skills keywords
- Job descriptions have hidden keywords
- How to match them perfectly
- Demo of AI tool
[CTA]
"Try it free - link in bio"
```

### Reel 7: "LinkedIn Profile Mistakes"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"Your LinkedIn looks unprofessional. Here's why..."
[CONTENT - 3-25 sec]
- Bad headline format
- No keywords in About section
- Wrong experience style
- Before/After transformation
[CTA]
"Get your LinkedIn optimized too"
```

### Reel 8: "Job Search Secret Nobody Talks About"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"There's one thing that gets you interviews. It's not your experience..."
[CONTENT - 3-30 sec]
- Keywords matter more than skills
- ATS optimization > Experience
- How to find right keywords
- Tool demo
[CTA]
"Stop wasting applications - try the tool"
```

### Reel 9: "I Applied to 100 Jobs - Here's What Worked"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"I applied to 100 jobs. Here's what actually worked..."
[CONTENT - 3-30 sec]
- 97% rejection rate (normal)
- What changed my results
- Optimized resume = more calls
- Real transformation shown
[CTA]
"Get your optimized resume - link in bio"
```

### Reel 10: "Stop Doing This in Your Resume"
```
[HOOK - 0-3 sec]
"If your resume has this, recruiters auto-reject you..."
[CONTENT - 3-25 sec]
- 10+ year old experience listed first
- Misspelled words
- Wrong file format
- Generic objective statements
[CTA]
"Fix it now - free tool in bio"
```

## 5 YOUTUBE SHORTS IDEAS

### Short 1: "Resume in 60 Seconds"
```
Title: "I Made a Perfect Resume in 60 Seconds"
Hook: "Most people spend days on their resume. I did it in 60 seconds."
Content: Speed-run of AI tool, before/after, download result
Duration: 60 seconds
```

### Short 2: "Fresher Resume Hack"
```
Title: "Fresher? This Resume Hack Gets You Interviews"
Hook: "No experience? Here's how to still get hired."
Content: Show fresher resume optimization, add skills, quantify projects
Duration: 60 seconds
```

### Short 3: "Salary Negotiation Power Move"
```
Title: "Your Resume Determines Your Salary. Here's Why"
Hook: "Recruiters decide your salary before they meet you."
Content: Resume quality = negotiation power, ATS keywords, metrics
Duration: 60 seconds
```

### Short 4: "LinkedIn Secret"
```
Title: "Your LinkedIn Profile is Wrong. Here's the Fix"
Hook: "Recruiters search LinkedIn differently than you think."
Content: Show headline optimization, keyword placement
Duration: 60 seconds
```

### Short 5: "Job Application Mistake"
```
Title: "This Mistake Kills 90% of Job Applications"
Hook: "You're applying wrong. Here's the correct way."
Content: Keyword matching, resume customization, ATS bypass
Duration: 60 seconds
```

## CAPTION TEMPLATES

### Caption 1: Pain Point
```
"Your resume is the reason you're not getting interviews.

Here's what nobody tells you:

→ 95% of resumes never reach human eyes
→ ATS systems scan in 6 seconds
→ Your keywords matter more than your skills

I built an AI tool that fixes this automatically.

Link in bio → Optimize your resume in minutes"

#JobSearch #ResumeTips #CareerAdvice #JobHunt #Resume
```

### Caption 2: Transformation
```
"Saw a resume that went from 0 calls to 5 interviews in 1 week.

What changed?

✅ ATS keywords added
✅ Weak bullets rewritten
✅ Measurable achievements added
✅ Professional formatting

This is what proper optimization looks like.

Get yours optimized → Link in bio"

#ResumeOptimization #CareerGrowth #JobSeeking
```

### Caption 3: Urgency + Pain
```
"STOP submitting this resume:

❌ "Responsible for testing"
❌ "Helped with development"
❌ "Worked on projects"

DO THIS instead:

✅ "Led QA testing reducing bugs by 40%"
✅ "Collaborated with 5-person team"
✅ "Delivered 3 features on time"

Your words determine your salary.

Optimize your resume → Link in bio"

#ResumeWriting #CareerTips #JobInterview #TechJobs
```

### Caption 4: Social Proof
```
"Joined 10,000+ job seekers who transformed their resume.

Results:
🎯 85% more interview calls
📄 ATS score increased by 50%
💼 Average salary increase: 25%

Why are you still using your old resume?

Link in bio → Optimize now"

#ResumeTips #CareerAdvice #JobHunt #Success
```

### Caption 5: Offer
```
"FREE resume tip that took me 6 months to learn:

Your resume summary should NOT start with "I am a..."

Instead, start with the VALUE you bring:

❌ "I am a software developer..."
✅ "I build scalable systems that save companies $100K+"

This one change = more interviews.

Get your full resume optimized → Link in bio"

#ResumeTips #CareerGrowth #JobSeekers #InterviewTips
```

## HOOKS LIBRARY (For Testing)

### Pain-Based Hooks
1. "Your resume is getting you fired from jobs you never got"
2. "Stop lying on your resume. Here's what actually works"
3. "Recruiters can tell in 6 seconds if you're qualified"
4. "You're applying wrong. This is why"

### Curiosity Hooks
1. "I analyzed 1,000 resumes. Here's what the best ones have"
2. "What if your resume scored itself?"
3. "The 3-second rule that gets you interviews"
4. "I built an AI that rewrites resumes. It's scary good"

### Transformation Hooks
1. "From rejected to hired in 7 days"
2. "Watch me destroy and rebuild this resume"
3. "Before/after that got someone a 40% raise"
4. "The resume that changed my career"

### Authority Hooks
1. "Recruiters told me what they actually look for"
2. "I asked 50 hiring managers what they hate most"
3. "This resume trick doubled my interview rate"
4. "What top 1% resumes have in common"
